gene_region.label: MYH7 transcribed interval
gene_region.definition: Canonical MYH7 genomic interval on GRCh37 / hg19 from Ensembl GRCh37 lookup, aligned to the hg19 coordinate system used by this app.

promoter_review_region.label: Operational promoter review window
promoter_review_region.definition: A practical 1 kb upstream window relative to the reverse-strand transcription start, used to flag promoter-adjacent coverage before the canonical gene interval.

promoter_hotspot_region.label: Promoter-associated CpG review window
promoter_hotspot_region.definition: Promoter-proximal CpG-focused span represented by the bundled EPIC subset and used here as the main methylation-review hotspot.

gene_context.gene_summary: MYH7 encodes beta-myosin heavy chain, a cardiac and slow-skeletal muscle motor protein that converts ATP hydrolysis into sarcomere force generation.
gene_context.clinical_context: The local MYH7 bundle is sarcomere and cardiomyopathy oriented. High-impact MYH7 variants require cardiac phenotype, family history, inheritance, and expert variant classification.
variant_effect_overview: MYH7 missense variants can alter myosin motor function and are important in hypertrophic, dilated, or other cardiomyopathy contexts.
Variant location, conservation, segregation, and phenotype matching are critical for interpretation.
condition_research_overview: Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context
Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology
gene_context.methylation_interpretation: MYH7 methylation should be treated as local regulatory context around a beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology gene. Promoter-proximal methylation can support expression-potential review, but it should not replace genotype, RNA, protein, or phenotype data.
methylation_effects: Promoter or first-exon methylation may suggest a more restrained or permissive local expression state for MYH7.
Because MYH7 biology is tissue and pathway dependent, methylation values are context rather than a stand-alone biomarker.

Combined sequence plus methylation findings are most useful when interpreted against beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology.
methylation_condition_research: Epigenetic regulation studies that use MYH7 promoter or gene-body methylation as expression-context evidence.
Variant-plus-methylation review for beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology.
Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context
Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology

evidence.label: Ensembl GRCh37 ENSG00000092054: MYH7 coordinate source

biorender_visuals.label: MYH7 biochemical figure starter
biorender_visuals.focus: beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology
biorender_visuals.usage_note: BioRender template and icon-library search results are bundled as figure starters. Open the template link in BioRender, then add or replace the listed icons to make a gene-specific biochemical pathway image.

gene_context.concrete_variant_prediction: The variant observed in this sample suggests a MYH7 sarcomere-motor thesis: the individual may carry context relevant to beta-myosin force generation, cardiomyocyte contraction, hypertrophic or dilated cardiomyopathy review, or muscle ATPase biology. Clinical meaning requires variant classification and phenotype match.

variant_records.clinical_interpretation: MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q is curated as a MYH7 marker for Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context, Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology. Read it through genotype dosage, phenotype context, and the beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology pathway rather than as a stand-alone deterministic result.
variant_records.clinical_significance: Curated research and clinical-context marker; external clinical classification is required for diagnostic use.
functional_effects: Can modify or tag beta-myosin heavy-chain motor activity, sarcomere contraction, ATPase force generation, and cardiomyopathy biology.
Best interpreted with tissue, ancestry, phenotype, and assay context.
associated_conditions: Hypertrophic and dilated cardiomyopathy review context
Sarcomere force generation and ATPase motor biology
research_context: Use this marker as a MYH7 pathway-context signal, not as a stand-alone diagnosis.
Sequence, methylation, expression, and protein data may point in different directions and should be reconciled.
variant_records.methylation_interpretation: Pair MYH7 p.Arg403Gln / R403Q with MYH7 methylation only as local regulatory context; methylation does not prove the variant's biochemical effect.
